purpose: Prevent arXiv intake from being promoted into proof or paper-truth claims before reading, formal comparison, or experiment.

demotion_rules: A catalog row proves only that local Gather recorded a source lead with a hash and ref.
A catalog row does not prove the paper's claims.
A catalog row does not prove relevance to the Telos packet until read and compared.
The Lean replay theorem remains the only formal MATCH in this twentieth-wave package.
Any source claim reused in public copy must cite the source row and carry SOURCE_LEAD_ONLY, INFERRED, or UNVERIFIABLE until separately checked.
